# Conditional Simulation

**Summary**: A stochastic simulation technique used to model uncertainty and variability in geological models.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] applied conditional simulation to derive simulated values of P20% in the two horizons.
